title: Forged Additions
description: A bare-bones content update for Forge.
body:
Forged Additions is a very, very bare-bones content mod that adds some new blocks, mobs and ores.

**Etherstone Ore**

A new ore that can be used to make the powerful Etherbrand sword.

**Primordial Ore**

A new, similar to iron, ore that adds tools and armor.

**Seether and Crusher**

These blocks can, respectively, create and dry sponges, and crushthe new ores into dust

**Klink**

This new mob is the mod's first (maybe only) boss, that is a good way to get Primordial Ore.

**Enderling**

A zombie replacement to the end, being very common. While the Enderling is very fragile when hit, its speed make sup for that.

**Frostburn effect, Icebloom and Vial**

The frostburn effect is collected from brewing an awkward potion with the Icebloom, a new flower. Doing so will give the Vial potion, that applies said effect. Frostburn makes you deal 1 less damage, but gives an 1 armor for the duration.

This mod, as said before, is very bare-bones, so it is recommended to add some other mods for a better experience.
